source: explorations/qudit-three-wall-ladder-result-2026-07-09.md (honest limit #1: confirm F_share against a closed form)
literature: Symmetric-extendibility boundary for isotropic states; Johnson & Viola PRA 88 032323 (2013); arXiv 0906.5255.
structural_facts: F_share(d) > 1/d for all d (shareability strictly above separability)
d3_link: F_share(3) = 2/3 = 0.6667, matching the qudit ladder's POCS value 0.670.
scope: POCS is a feasibility test (no dual-witness certificate); the closed form is the certified value, POCS is an independent numeric confirmation.
